data.title: New Book Explores Healing Through Shadow Integration and Emotional Awareness
data.description: Kaitlin Kesler, a compassionate author, presents a unique approach to shadow work in her latest book "From Shadow Into Light: Heal," released on March 30, 2026. The book delves into the exploration of suppressed emotions, shadow patterns, and repetitive behaviors. Kesler provides guidance on integrating these aspects, offering readers valuable insights.

data.title: Novo Nordisk A/S - share repurchase programme
data.description: In Bagsværd, Denmark, Novo Nordisk began a share buyback program on February 4, 2026, following regulations established by the European Parliament and Council as well as the EU Safe Harbour Rules. This initiative is a component of an overarching share repurchase plan totaling DKK 15 billion, set to be implemented over a year-long span starting from the aforementioned date.

data.title: Quantum BioPharma Signs Binding Letter Of Intent With Allucent To Conduct Phase 2 Clinical Trial In Multiple Sclerosis
data.description: A significant move has been made in the clinical development of Lucid-21-302, a pioneering treatment for inhibiting demyelination. A strategic partnership has been formed with a global Clinical Research Organization (CRO) to advance the research. This collaboration highlights the commitment to progress in the clinical development of Lucid-21-302, which is a novel first-in-class treatment. This partnership marks a crucial step forward in the journey towards potentially groundbreaking treatments, with Lucid-21-302 showing promise in inhibiting demyelination. This development signifies a new phase in the research, with the partnership set to bolster the clinical progress of Lucid-21-302.

data.title: Omdia: US PC Market Returned to 3% Growth in Q4 2025 as Windows 11 Refresh and Component Cost Increases Converged
data.description: In London, latest data from Omdia reveals that US PC shipments (excluding tablets) saw a 3% year-on-year increase in Q4 2025, reaching 18.2 million units. This growth marks a reversal from two previous quarters of annual decline. Factors contributing to this upturn include the peak of Windows 11 commercial refreshes, heightened demand during the holiday season, and vendors proactively acquiring inventory in anticipation of potential memory and storage supply limitations in 2026. Throughout the entire year of 2025, PC shipments totaled 71.5 million units, reflecting a 3% increase.

data.description: There is a growing anticipation among economists and investors that if the conflict persists, there could be a deceleration in the economy, potentially leading to a worldwide recession.

data.title: NG ENERGY ANNOUNCES FILING OF ANNUAL AUDITED CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS
data.description: In the fiscal year 2025, a company reported a noteworthy $44.6 million in sales from natural gas and natural gas liquids. They successfully commenced commercial production at the Sinú-9 Block, leading to a dual-field production setup. By the end of March 2025, the company achieved a record high in their combined gross average daily production for the fourth quarter, reaching around 20,934 thousand cubic feet per day. Additionally, the company observed a decrease in per-unit operating costs at the Sinú-9 field.

data.title: CELEBRATING 25 YEARS AND BEYOND OF LIFE AFTER ORGAN TRANSPLANTATION AT THE NATIONAL UNIVERSITY CENTRE FOR ORGAN TRANSPLANTATION
data.description: Recognizing the remarkable resilience of 35 individuals, an event in Singapore celebrated their successful organ transplant journeys on March 30, 2026. These patients serve as inspirational figures as they have surpassed the important milestone of 25 years post-transplantation. This achievement underscores the effectiveness and long-term success of organ transplants.

data.description: Today, MediPharm Labs disclosed its financial performance for the full year and three-month period concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Fancamp Acquires Iron Ore Royalty and Provides Corporate Update
data.description: Fancamp Exploration Ltd. has secured a royalty of up to 3% on iron ore in Newfoundland and Labrador. This development comes as the company progresses towards a targeted spin-out of its exploration assets in 2026.

data.title: Soluna Reports Record 2025 Growth: Pipeline Hits 4.3GW, Raises $142 Million, and Launches AI Infrastructure
data.description: Albany, New York - Soluna Holdings, Inc. disclosed their financial summary for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The Company, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol SLNH, specializes in eco-friendly data centers catering to demanding computational tasks like Bitcoin mining and artificial intelligence. In 2025, a pivotal year for Soluna Holdings, operational capacity doubled, with the power pipeline expanding to 4.3 gigawatts. Additionally, two fresh project-specific financial collaborators were acquired, and an AI infrastructure program was inaugurated.
